title: Fix Medication Review Prescriber GraphRecursionError on optimizer baseline items

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Patched retry-capable node subgraph invocation in plexus/scores/nodes/BaseNode.py to pass a recursion limit derived from maximum_retry_count, so LangGraph no longer throws GraphRecursionError before Classifier reaches its own max-retries path. Local validation on the exact failing Prescriber items (309504413 and 306082262) no longer reproduces GraphRecursionError; the score now completes via bounded retry/max-retries behavior instead of crashing.
